Word breakdown կատարել + ա + պաշտ + ութիւն "Կատարել " derives from "կատարեալ" (perfect). "Պաշտ" is the (to worship). This root is used to form words which denote conviction, artistic movements or philosophical schools of thought, corresponding to the English suffix "ism" (պաշտութիւն), e.g. "արդիապաշտութիւն" (modernism), "արեւելապաշտութիւե" (orientalism) or "իգապաշտութիւն" (feminism). "Ութիւն" is a suffix which forms abstract nouns. Centre for Western Armenian Studies Արեւմտահայագիտական Ուսմանց Կեդրոն

Etymology It is a loan word from the Persian "ispanakh*. In Armenian there is the word "շՉոմին", which is considered an Armenian equivalent of or more formal. This is a fallacy. The origin of the "Չոմին" is also Persian. Therefore, the word "սպանախ"', which is widely used in spoken Western Armenian, is as much not Armenian as "շոմին". Word breakdown իգ + w+ պաշտ "Իգ" derives from "Էգ" (feminine). "Ա" is a linking letter. "Պաշտ" is the (to worship). Unfortunately this root has been misconceived by many native speakers, with a religious fervency imparted to it. It simply denotes conviction or persuasion to an idea. It is also widely used to form words which denote someone who adheres to artistic movements or philosophical schools of thought, corresponding to the English suffix ‘ist’, 6.9. "արդիապաշտ" (modernist), "արեւելապաշտ" (orientalist). It is also serves as an adjective. Centre for Western Armenian Studies Արեւմտահայագիտական Ուսմանց Կեդրոն

Etymology There are two schools of thought on the origin of this word. First, Sdepan Malkhasiants considers it to originate from "կրունկ" (heel). Word breakdown ծխՀնՀչեՀլոյզ Etymology This word is not found in the Armenian etymological dictionaries. This is my theory of the breakdown of the word. The word originates from the phrase "Ծուխն ի լոյս", which literally means “smoke towards light". This is how it became "Ծխնելոյզ". "Ծխ" derives from "Ծուխ" (smoke). "Ն" is a relic from Krapar. The particle "ի" became "Ե" as the phrase was compressed into a single word. "Լոյս" (light) became "|njq". Centre for Western Armenian Studies Արեւմտահայագիտական Ուսմանց Կեդրոն
